Native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], '''woolly veermoks''' were dangerous predators that lived on the frozen swamps of Naboo's northern hemisphere. Once the natural enemies of [[Gungan/Legends|Gungans]] during Naboo's ice age, the woolly cousins of the four-legged [[Veermok/Legends|veermoks]] were known for their untameable nature, prompting the Naboo government to make attempted capture of the creatures an illegal activity.
